Day advanced to 2026-02-21.
9,520 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
150 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 1 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-02-22): ['992626']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-20 -> 2026-02-21)

- "By February 28, 2026, which Ukrainian city will be reported as the site of a deadly attack in which two explosions hit police responding to an emergency at a store?" → Lviv
- "Which country will finish the 2026 Winter Olympics with 30 total medals, setting a new national Winter Olympics record, by 22 February 2026?" → Italy
- "Which country will win the men's ice hockey gold medal at the Milano Cortina Winter Olympics by February 22, 2026?" → United States
- "What letters will the new alliance of six Iranian Kurdish opposition groups formed by late February 2026 be known by, by March 5, 2026?" → CPFIK
- "Which country’s government will say it “strongly condemns” Pakistan’s air strikes on Afghan territory by February 27, 2026?" → India
- "Which ambassador will France say it is summoning over comments on Quentin Deranque’s death by February 28, 2026?" → Charles Kushner

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (180 resolved, 150 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
